channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Supreme Court rules Trump cannot fire Fed Governor Lisa Cook for now
item.description: The ruling by the Supreme Court means that Lisa Cook will remain as a Federal Reserve governor as her lawsuit challenging Trump's effort to fire her proceeds.

item.title: Dow jumps more than 200 points as U.S.-Iran halt hostilities, Alphabet shares gain: Live updates
item.description: Stocks rose Monday as investors weighed a pause in hostilities between the U.S. and Iran.

item.title: What's behind the Comcast break-up? Hope for a Disney-like valuation
item.description: NBCUniversal could look like Disney, which trades at 10 times price-to-earnings, one analyst says.

item.title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Comcast, Charter Communications, Rocket Lab, Alphabet, Verizon & more
item.description: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.

item.title: Alphabet stock pops 4% on Dow debut, but the tech giant faces major AI questions
item.description: Alphabet shares rose Monday as the company joined the Dow, but the blue-chip milestone comes as the stock remains under pressure.

item.title: This insurance stock is on an impressive run. How to ride the momentum with less risk
item.description: MetLife (MET) is well-positioned in the life insurance and benefits sector, exhibiting fundamental momentum that the broader market hasn't fully priced in.

item.title: Comcast jumps 9% after announcing it will spin off NBCUniversal and Sky from cable business
item.description: Comcast said it will separate into two publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky.

item.title: RBC lifts S&P 500 price target, but warns that it could be a volatile ride higher
item.description: The firm said the hike was driven in part by the "stronger signal" seen when looking at earnings per share and valuation expectations.

item.title: Trump bought as much as $5 million in Axon stock before ICE sought $220 million Taser deal
item.description: Axon Enterprise has ramped up lobbying in Congress on federal law enforcement technology as ICE pursues a potential $220 million Taser deal.

item.title: Kalshi traders expect this week's jobs report will disappoint Wall Street outlook
item.description: Dow Jones expects over 118,000 jobs will be added, but Kalshi traders give under 60% that over 100,000 jobs will be added.

item.title: Oil prices near pre-war levels — but persistent supply risks could spark a rebound, analysts warn
item.description: Commodity strategists warn that Iranian leverage in the Strait of Hormuz will continue to weigh on oil markets and shipping costs.

item.title: Oil prices rise as U.S. and Iran reach deal to halt attacks, U.S. oil above $70 per barrel again
item.description: Oil prices were higher after an agreement between the U.S. and Iran to halt recent hostilities in the Middle East.

item.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran to hold fresh talks in Qatar on Tuesday following weekend clashes
item.description: The U.S. and Iran are poised to hold fresh talks on Tuesday in Qatar's capital, President Donald Trump said via social media on Monday.

item.title: 'This bargain is eroding': Inside the youngest generations' view of the American Dream
item.description: Gen Z is at a tipping point, some economists say: the first U.S. generation in living memory where the majority may be unable to achieve the American Dream.

item.title: Putin’s fuel shortage admission signals growing strain on Russia’s energy infrastructure
item.description: Putin's comments mark the first time he has detailed the extent to which Ukraine's deep-strike successes have hampered Russia's fuel production.

item.title: July rally may be in store for stocks after weak June, Freedom's Jay Woods says
item.description: Woods noted the S&P 500 has advanced in July during each of the last eight years following a negative June performance.

item.title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
item.description: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

item.title: Rocket Lab pops 9%, Iridium soars 20% on $8 billion space consolidation deal
item.description: Iridium shareholders will receive $27 in cash as ⁠well as Rocket Lab shares, with a combined value of $54 per Iridium share.

item.title: SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale drives huge demand - and a potential headache for investors
item.description: SpaceX’s $25 billion debt sale drew heavy demand, but analysts warn of capital spending, refinancing and investor concentration risks.

item.title: Martin Marietta to buy Lhoist North America in $13.5 billion deal
item.description: Martin Marietta Materials said on Monday it would merge with limestone supplier Lhoist North America in a cash-and-stock deal worth $13.5 billion.

item.title: Why our cybersecurity stocks are soaring, plus Big Tech tries to rebound
item.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

item.title: Alliant Credit Union's new checking account pays up to 2% APY — see how it stacks up
item.description: Alliant Credit Union's new jumbo high-rate checking account pays up to 2% APY with no cap on earnings. Here's what to know.

item.title: Josh Brown was wrong on these three names on his Best Stocks list. Here are the lessons
item.description: Josh Brown and Sean Russo take another look at three names they got wrong on their Best Stocks list.

item.title: How Kohl's lost its way — and is trying to become relevant again
item.description: Kohl's went from a household name to a plunging stock as it lost relevancy and its core customer. Now, the company is trying to turn itself around.

item.title: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
item.description: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.

item.title: Op-ed: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
item.description: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.

item.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: Severe weather
item.description: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.

item.title: The first half of 2026 has been strong. Why investors should expect more upside
item.description: Don't expect the stock market's momentum in the first six months of 2026 to wane in the back half of the year, according to CFRA.

item.title: Protein coffee? Brands cash in on functional beverage boom
item.description: "We're selling [almost] as much protein cold foam as we do flat whites," Starbuck's EMEA Manager of Beverage Development Sam Henderson told CNBC.

item.title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
item.description: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.
